name: xauusd_m15_bb_bounce_threebar
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, a confirmed three-bar Bollinger Band bounce (prior-bar pierce, current-bar close back inside) marks a high-probability mean-reversion entry with 2.5R target, provided it happens during session hours and outside extreme ADX trend regimes.

entry_rules.long: bar[-2].close > lower_bb AND bar[-1].low <= lower_bb AND bar[0].close > lower_bb AND session_active
entry_rules.short: bar[-2].close < upper_bb AND bar[-1].high >= upper_bb AND bar[0].close < upper_bb AND session_active

exit_rules.tp: 2.5R fixed OR opposite BB touch, whichever first
